b:["$","$L1a",null,{"title":"QueryEngine 两层架构","nodes":[{"id":"qe","label":"QueryEngine","x":250,"y":20,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"submit","label":"submitMessage()","x":80,"y":100,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"sysprompt","label":"fetchSystemPrompt()","x":380,"y":100,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"procinput","label":"processUserInput()","x":80,"y":180,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"query","label":"query() while(true)","x":250,"y":250,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"hooks","label":"handleStopHooks()","x":450,"y":250,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"model","label":"callModel()","x":100,"y":330,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"tools","label":"runTools()","x":280,"y":330,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"compact","label":"autocompact()","x":450,"y":330,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"}],"edges":[{"from":"qe","to":"submit","label":""},{"from":"qe","to":"sysprompt","label":""},{"from":"submit","to":"procinput","label":""},{"from":"procinput","to":"query","label":""},{"from":"query","to":"model","label":"stream"},{"from":"query","to":"tools","label":"execute"},{"from":"query","to":"compact","label":"if needed"},{"from":"query","to":"hooks","label":"end_turn"},{"from":"hooks","to":"query","label":"retry"}],"width":620,"height":380}]
c:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"8 步执行流程","subtitle":"query() 循环的完整生命周期"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["以下是 ",["$","code",null,{"className":"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-[var(--card-bg)] border border-[var(--card-border)] text-sm font-mono text-[var(--accent-cyan)]","children":"queryLoop()"}]," ","每次迭代执行的 8 个核心步骤。点击自动播放可观看完整流程动画。"]}]}],["$","$L1b",null,{"title":"query() 核心循环 — 8 步流程","steps":[{"code":"// query.ts — queryLoop entry\nasync function* queryLoop(params: QueryParams) {\n  const budgetTracker = feature('TOKEN_BUDGET') \n    ? createBudgetTracker() : null\n  const config = buildQueryConfig()\n\n  // Fire-and-forget memory prefetch\n  using pendingMemoryPrefetch = \n    startRelevantMemoryPrefetch(messages, toolUseContext)\n\n  while (true) {","highlight":[2,3,7,8],"description":"Step 1: 初始化 — 创建 BudgetTracker、快照 QueryConfig（session ID、feature gates）、启动异步内存预取"},{"code":"// Snip: remove stale zombie markers\nif (feature('HISTORY_SNIP')) {\n  const snipResult = snipModule.snipCompactIfNeeded(messagesForQuery)\n  messagesForQuery = snipResult.messages\n  snipTokensFreed = snipResult.tokensFreed\n}\n\n// Microcompact: remove redundant tool results\nconst microcompactResult = await deps.microcompact(\n  messagesForQuery, toolUseContext, querySource\n)\nmessagesForQuery = microcompactResult.messages","highlight":[2,3,4,8,9,10],"description":"Step 2: 上下文压缩 — 依次执行 Snip（移除僵尸标记）、Microcompact（去除冗余工具结果）、Context Collapse（细粒度摘要）"},{"code":"// Autocompact: full conversation summarization\nconst { compactionResult } = await deps.autocompact(\n  messagesForQuery, toolUseContext,\n  { systemPrompt, userContext, systemContext, toolUseContext,\n    forkContextMessages: messagesForQuery },\n  querySource, tracking, snipTokensFreed\n)\n\nif (compactionResult) {\n  const postCompactMessages = \n    buildPostCompactMessages(compactionResult)\n  messagesForQuery = postCompactMessages\n}","highlight":[2,3,7,8,9],"description":"Step 3: 自动压缩 — 当 token 超过阈值时，将整段对话摘要为 compact_boundary 消息，释放上下文窗口"},{"code":"// Blocking limit check (skip if compact just ran)\nif (!compactionResult && querySource !== 'compact') {\n  const { isAtBlockingLimit } = calculateTokenWarningState(\n    tokenCountWithEstimation(messagesForQuery) - snipTokensFreed,\n    toolUseContext.options.mainLoopModel\n  )\n  if (isAtBlockingLimit) {\n    yield createAssistantAPIErrorMessage({\n      content: PROMPT_TOO_LONG_ERROR_MESSAGE,\n      error: 'invalid_request'\n    })\n    return { reason: 'blocking_limit' }\n  }\n}","highlight":[2,3,4,5,6,10],"description":"Step 4: 阻塞检查 — 如果上下文超过硬性上限且自动压缩未运行，直接报错退出，保留手动 /compact 空间"},{"code":"// Call Claude API with streaming\nfor await (const message of deps.callModel({\n  messages: prependUserContext(messagesForQuery, userContext),\n  systemPrompt: fullSystemPrompt,\n  thinkingConfig: toolUseContext.options.thinkingConfig,\n  tools: toolUseContext.options.tools,\n  signal: toolUseContext.abortController.signal,\n  options: { model: currentModel, fallbackModel, taskBudget }\n})) {\n  // Yield streaming events to consumers\n  yield message\n  if (message.type === 'assistant') {\n    assistantMessages.push(message)\n    // Collect tool_use blocks\n    const toolUseBlocks = message.message.content\n      .filter(c => c.type === 'tool_use')\n    if (toolUseBlocks.length > 0) needsFollowUp = true\n  }\n}","highlight":[2,3,4,5,6,7,11,12,14,15,16,17],"description":"Step 5: 调用 Claude API — 流式请求 Claude 模型，收集 assistant 消息和 tool_use 块，检测是否需要后续工具执行"},{"code":"// Execute tools (streaming or batch)\nconst toolUpdates = streamingToolExecutor\n  ? streamingToolExecutor.getRemainingResults()\n  : runTools(toolUseBlocks, assistantMessages, \n      canUseTool, toolUseContext)\n\nfor await (const update of toolUpdates) {\n  if (update.message) {\n    yield update.message\n    toolResults.push(\n      ...normalizeMessagesForAPI([update.message], tools)\n        .filter(_ => _.type === 'user')\n    )\n  }\n}","highlight":[2,3,4,6,7,8,9],"description":"Step 6: 执行工具 — StreamingToolExecutor 并行执行只读工具，runTools 串行执行写操作，收集 tool_result"},{"code":"// Attach file changes, memory, queued commands\nfor await (const attachment of getAttachmentMessages(\n  null, updatedToolUseContext, null, queuedCommandsSnapshot,\n  [...messagesForQuery, ...assistantMessages, ...toolResults],\n  querySource\n)) {\n  yield attachment\n  toolResults.push(attachment)\n}\n\n// Inject prefetched memory & skill discovery\n// Check maxTurns limit\nif (maxTurns && nextTurnCount > maxTurns) {\n  yield createAttachmentMessage({ \n    type: 'max_turns_reached', maxTurns, turnCount \n  })\n  return { reason: 'max_turns' }\n}","highlight":[2,3,4,12,13,14,15,16],"description":"Step 7: 附件注入 — 注入文件变更通知、内存附件、队列命令，检查 maxTurns 上限，准备下一轮递归"},{"code":"// Stop hooks: execute post-turn checks\nconst stopHookResult = yield* handleStopHooks(\n  messagesForQuery, assistantMessages,\n  systemPrompt, userContext, systemContext,\n  toolUseContext, querySource, stopHookActive\n)\n\nif (stopHookResult.preventContinuation) \n  return { reason: 'stop_hook_prevented' }\nif (stopHookResult.blockingErrors.length > 0) {\n  // Inject blocking errors and retry\n  state = { messages: [...messagesForQuery, ...assistantMessages, \n    ...stopHookResult.blockingErrors], ... }\n  continue\n}\n\n// Token budget check\nif (feature('TOKEN_BUDGET')) {\n  const decision = checkTokenBudget(budgetTracker, ...)\n  if (decision.action === 'continue') { /* inject nudge */ }\n  if (decision.completionEvent) { /* log and stop */ }\n}\n\nreturn { reason: 'completed' }","highlight":[2,3,4,7,8,12,13,14,17,18,19],"description":"Step 8: 终止检查 — 执行 stop hooks（后台钩子）、检查 token budget（90% 阈值继续或边际递减停止），最终返回 completed"}],"language":"typescript"}]]}]}]
d:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"执行流程全景图","subtitle":"从用户输入到最终结果的完整数据流"}],["$","$L1a",null,{"title":"QueryEngine 完整执行流程图","nodes":[{"id":"user","label":"👤 用户输入","x":250,"y":10,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"qe2","label":"QueryEngine.submitMessage()","x":250,"y":70,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"proc","label":"processUserInput()","x":250,"y":125,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"loop","label":"query() while(true)","x":250,"y":185,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"snip","label":"Snip","x":50,"y":250,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"micro","label":"Microcompact","x":50,"y":305,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"auto","label":"Autocompact","x":50,"y":360,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"api","label":"Claude API\n(streaming)","x":250,"y":270,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"resp","label":"assistant +\ntool_use","x":250,"y":340,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"tool","label":"runTools() /\nStreamingExecutor","x":460,"y":270,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"tresult","label":"tool_results","x":460,"y":340,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"stop","label":"Stop Hooks","x":160,"y":415,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"budget","label":"Token Budget","x":340,"y":415,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"result","label":"✅ result","x":250,"y":470,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"}],"edges":[{"from":"user","to":"qe2","label":""},{"from":"qe2","to":"proc","label":""},{"from":"proc","to":"loop","label":""},{"from":"loop","to":"snip","label":"压缩"},{"from":"snip","to":"micro","label":""},{"from":"micro","to":"auto","label":""},{"from":"loop","to":"api","label":"调用"},{"from":"api","to":"resp","label":""},{"from":"resp","to":"tool","label":"tool_use"},{"from":"tool","to":"tresult","label":""},{"from":"tresult","to":"loop","label":"递归"},{"from":"loop","to":"stop","label":"end_turn"},{"from":"loop","to":"budget","label":"检查"},{"from":"stop","to":"result","label":""},{"from":"budget","to":"result","label":""}],"width":580,"height":510}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-8 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4","children":[["$","div","初始化阶段",{"className":"p-5 rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)]","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-2 mb-3","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"w-3 h-3 rounded-full","style":{"background":"var(--accent-cyan)"}}],["$","h5",null,{"className":"text-base font-semibold gap-2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[var(--accent-cyan)] mt-0.5","children":"▸"}],"创建 BudgetTracker 和 QueryConfig"]}],["$","li","1",{"className":"text-sm (pendingMemoryPrefetch)"]}],["$","li","2",{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)] flex items-start gap-2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[var(--accent-cyan)] text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"上下文管理"}]]}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"space-y-2","children":[["$","li","0",{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)] flex items-start gap-2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[var(--accent-cyan)] mt-0.5","children":"▸"}],"Snip — 移除过期的僵尸标记"]}],["$","li","1",{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)] flex
